title: Rename /sdlc command to /isdlc for naming consistency

user_stories.story: As a developer using the iSDLC framework, I want the slash command to be /isdlc (not /sdlc) so that the command name matches the project brand.
As a framework installer, I want the init process to copy isdlc.md (not sdlc.md) so that new projects get the correctly named command.
As a framework maintainer, I want zero stale /sdlc references remaining so that the rename is complete and auditable.
